name: ProfitSword (Actabl) Hotel Financial Analytics API
what_it_does: ProfitSword (Actabl) hotel financial analytics and business intelligence REST API for daily flash reporting, forecasting, and multi-property financial consolidation for hotel management companies and ownership groups. Enables AI agents to manage daily hotel flash report generation and distribution for hotel performance reporting automation, handle budget variance analysis and department-level P&L for hotel financial intelligence automation, access revenue and cost per occupied room (RevPAR, CPOR) KPI calculations for hotel performance benchmarking, retrieve multi-property financial consolidation for hotel portfolio reporting automation, manage forecasting and forward-looking occupancy and revenue projection for hotel planning automation, handle PMS and POS data integration for automated daily financial aggregation, access general ledger integration for accurate financial reporting, retrieve owner and investor reporting package generation for asset management automation, manage benchmark comparison using STR data for competitive performance reporting, and integrate ProfitSword with M3, Oracle OPERA, Agilysys, and ADP for full hospitality financial intelligence ecosystem.
use_cases: Generating daily flash reports from hotel performance agents
Consolidating portfolio P&L from ownership group agents
Forecasting occupancy from revenue planning agents
Reporting to owners from asset management agents
not_for: Full-service hotel accounting (use M3 or Aptech)
Real estate portfolio financial reporting beyond hospitality
best_when: A hotel management company, owner, or REIT wanting AI agents to automate daily hotel flash reporting, multi-property financial consolidation, budget variance analysis, and investor reporting within ProfitSword/Actabl as the hospitality BI platform.
avoid_when: DATA SOURCE ACCURACY DEPENDENCY FOR FLASH REPORTS: ProfitSword flash report accuracy depends on complete and timely data feeds from PMS (OPERA, Agilysys), POS (InfoGenesis, Simphony), and payroll (ADP, Paylocity) integrations; automated flash report generation before all data source feeds are confirmed complete creates inaccurate daily reporting; implement data completeness check before automated report generation. FORECASTING ACCURACY FOR OWNER COMMITMENTS: Automated forecasting and projection in ProfitSword uses historical patterns and forward booking data; automated owner or lender financial projection delivery based on ProfitSword forecasts carries inherent uncertainty; clearly label automated projections as estimates with confidence range; automated commitment to specific forward revenue targets based on ProfitSword projection creates financial obligation misrepresentation. MULTI-PROPERTY INTERCOMPANY MANAGEMENT FEE CALCULATION: Automated management fee calculation using ProfitSword P&L data must apply each property's management agreement fee structure; automated portfolio fee summary without property-specific agreement verification creates management company revenue recognition errors.

auth.notes: ProfitSword uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Atlanta, Georgia HQ (Actabl, parent company). ProfitSword founded 2009. Acquired by Actabl (formerly Hotel Solutions Partnership). Actabl platform includes ProfitSword (financial analytics), Hotel Effectiveness (labor management), and ALICE (guest operations). 2,500+ hotel properties. Hotel management company and ownership group focus. USALI financial reporting standard. Competes with M3, Aptech, and Otelier for hotel financial analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-property annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-property subscription; analytics, forecasting, and reporting modules; Actabl platform bundle available
pricing.notes: Atlanta GA. Actabl subsidiary. Founded 2009. 2,500+ hotel properties. Hotel financial analytics. Per-property annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; analytics and report generation queries throttled; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — DAILY FLASH AND ANALYTICS EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: ProfitSword does not support native webhooks; automated daily flash report generation and distribution requires scheduled polling after all data source feeds complete (PMS night audit, POS close, payroll import typically complete by 7-9am)

MULTI-SOURCE DATA FEED COMPLETENESS CHECK BEFORE REPORT GENERATION: ProfitSword flash report accuracy requires complete PMS, POS, and payroll data feeds; automated report generation before all feeds complete creates partial daily report; implement feed status check per data source before automated flash report trigger

FORECASTING MODEL RETRAINING ON COVID-DISRUPTED HISTORICAL DATA: ProfitSword forecasting using historical data from 2019-2022 includes COVID pandemic disruption years; automated forecasting models trained on disrupted historical data require period exclusion configuration for accurate forward projection; automated forecast delivery without disruption period exclusion creates inaccurate demand projection

Actabl platform API endpoint disambiguation — ProfitSword API endpoints are distinct from Hotel Effectiveness and ALICE APIs within Actabl platform; automated integrations spanning multiple Actabl products require separate API credentials and endpoint configuration per product; Actabl platform does not offer unified cross-product API endpoint

Owner report package generation timing and format — automated owner reporting via ProfitSword must generate USALI-compliant P&L with management agreement-specific fee calculations; report timing (monthly, quarterly) and format (PDF, Excel, dashboard link) must match management agreement owner reporting obligations; automated generic report delivery without agreement-specific format creates owner relations friction

STR benchmarking data license requirement — ProfitSword competitive benchmarking using STR (hotel industry benchmark) data requires separate STR data license per property; automated competitive analytics using STR-integrated ProfitSword data requires each property to have active STR subscription; automated competitive reporting for unlicensed properties creates data use violation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Hotel financial analytics. SOC2. API key. US. Hotel financial and performance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel analytics. SOC2. API key. US. Hotel financial and performance data.
